prompt: Create a dramatic fine-art portrait of a young woman in strict side profile facing right, shown from head to upper torso against a deep black studio background. Her face, neck, shoulder, and chest are mostly in near-black silhouette with only razor-thin warm rim highlights defining the nose, lips, jawline, throat, collarbone, and shoulder. The main visual focus is a huge mass of fiery golden-orange blonde hair blown powerfully to the left and curling around the face, glowing like illuminated strands of fire. Use extreme backlighting from behind the head and hair, creating a bright white-hot golden halo at the edge of the face and dense orange light through the flowing hair. The hair should contain countless long, distinct, ribbon-like strands and curls, sweeping horizontally across the frame with motion and energy. Composition is vertical portrait, close crop, face centered slightly right, hair filling the left half and wrapping around the right edge. Style is cinematic high-contrast photography, low-key lighting, warm amber and orange palette, glossy skin rim light, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed hair texture, elegant sensual mood, no clothing details emphasized, no text, no accessories, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a dramatic fine-art portrait of a young woman in strict side profile facing right, shown from head to upper torso against a deep black studio background. Her face, neck, shoulder, and chest are mostly in near-black silhouette with only razor-thin warm rim highlights defining the nose, lips, jawline, throat, collarbone, and shoulder. The main visual focus is a huge mass of fiery golden-orange blonde hair blown powerfully to the left and curling around the face, glowing like illuminated strands of fire. Use extreme backlighting from behind the head and hair, creating a bright white-hot golden halo at the edge of the face and dense orange light through the flowing hair. The hair should contain countless long, distinct, ribbon-like strands and curls, sweeping horizontally across the frame with motion and energy. Composition is vertical portrait, close crop, face centered slightly right, hair filling the left half and wrapping around the right edge. Style is cinematic high-contrast photography, low-key lighting, warm amber and orange palette, glossy skin rim light, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed hair texture, elegant sensual mood, no clothing details emphasized, no text, no accessories, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张极具戏剧性的艺术人像，主体为 年轻女性，严格侧面朝右，展示头部至上半身，背景为深邃的黑色摄影棚背景。她的脸部、颈部、肩部和胸部大多处于近乎全黑的剪影中，仅有极细的暖色轮廓光勾勒出鼻梁、嘴唇、下颌线、喉咙、锁骨和肩膀。视觉焦点是一大团 炽热的金橙色 头发，被强风吹向左侧并环绕脸部，如同发光的火焰丝线。使用来自头部和头发后方的极端背光，在脸部边缘形成明亮的白热金色光环，并透过飘逸的头发散发出浓郁的橙色光芒。头发应包含无数细长、清晰、丝带状的发丝和卷发，充满动感与能量地横向扫过画面。构图为竖向人像，紧凑裁剪，脸部略微偏右，头发填充左半部分并包裹右侧边缘。风格为电影级高对比度摄影，低调布光，暖琥珀色和橙色色调，光泽感皮肤轮廓光，浅景深，超精细发丝质感，优雅感性氛围，不强调服装细节，无文字，无配饰，无水印。
